name: Peggy Sage
message: [AI generated] Peggy Sage is a French beauty brand with a history spanning over 90 years. It specializes in cosmetic and nail care products. Their diverse range includes nail polish, nail treatments, and beauty products such as perfumes, make-up, skincare products, and beauty accessories. Over the years, Peggy Sage has become a go-to professional beauty brand for both individual users and salon professionals around the world.
